Description: Dictionary import/export/CRUD manager for Umbraco — full rewrite of the Umbraco 8 plugin using ILocalizationService. Supports Umbraco 13 (net8.0) and Umbraco 17 (net10.0).

AuthorDetails.Name: SplatDev
AuthorDetails.Description: SplatDev Ltda — building Umbraco plugins and tools for agencies and developers.
